Our HVAC Services

From emergency repairs to full system installations — we handle all your heating and cooling needs.

AC Repair & Installation

Fast air conditioning repair and new AC installation to keep your home cool all summer.

Furnace Repair & Installation

Expert furnace repair and high-efficiency furnace installation for reliable winter heat.

HVAC Maintenance

Preventive maintenance plans to extend equipment life and lower energy bills.

Heat Pump Services

Installation and repair of heat pump systems for year-round energy-efficient comfort.

Ductwork & Air Quality

Duct cleaning, sealing, and indoor air quality solutions for a healthier home.

Emergency Service

24/7 emergency HVAC repair when you need it most. Call us anytime — we respond fast!

Locally Owned & Operated in Lakeville, MN

Lakeville Heating & Cooling is a trusted HVAC contractor proudly serving Lakeville and surrounding areas. We bring decades of combined experience, honest upfront pricing, and a commitment to quality workmanship on every job.
